channel.title: Exploring Electronics
channel.description: Electronics from first principles — voltage, current, resistance, and circuit design explained clearly. Real components, real numbers, no prior knowledge assumed.

item.title: Home
item.description: Electronics from first principles — voltage, current, resistance, and circuit design explained clearly. Real components, real numbers, no prior knowledge assumed.

item.title: Series and Parallel Circuits
item.description: Two wiring patterns govern every circuit ever built. Learn how series and parallel circuits work — why voltage divides in one and stays constant in the other.

item.title: What Is Electricity?
item.description: The label on your USB charger says 5V ⎓ 2A. Two numbers that explain how electricity works — voltage, current, resistance, and Ohm's Law explained clearly.

item.title: Breadboards
item.description: How breadboard holes connect internally, how to use the power rails, and the wiring mistakes that kill every beginner's first circuit before it even starts.
